title: Knysna Heads Marathon set for Valentine’s Day run
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The annual Knysna Heads...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The annual Knysna Heads Marathon, hosted by the Knysna Marathon Club, will take place on Saturday, 14 February, coinciding with Valentine’s Day and offering runners a range of race options through some of Knysna’s most scenic routes.The event includes a 42.2km full marathon, which serves as a qualifying race for both the Comrades and Two Oceans marathons, a 21.1km half marathon, a 10km race, and a 5km fun run aimed at families and recreational runners.According to organisers, the event continues to attract both local and visiting runners, with the shorter-distance races providing an accessible entry point for those new to road running.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The annual Knysna Heads Marathon, hosted by the Knysna Marathon Club, will take place on Saturday, 14 February, coinciding with Valentine’s Day and offering runners a range of race options through some of Knysna’s most scenic routes.

The event includes a 42.2km full marathon, which serves as a qualifying race for both the Comrades and Two Oceans marathons, a 21.1km half marathon, a 10km race, and a 5km fun run aimed at families and recreational runners.

According to organisers, the event continues to attract both local and visiting runners, with the shorter-distance races providing an accessible entry point for those new to road running."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 5km fun run, in particular, is expected to draw community members looking for a relaxed and social race experience.With Valentine’s Day falling on race day, organisers say the marathon offers participants an opportunity to combine fitness with a shared social experience. Runners are encouraged to take part with partners, friends or family members, while visitors can enjoy the festive atmosphere surrounding the event.Entries are available online via entryninja.com where participants can search for Knysna Heads to register.The Knysna Marathon Club acknowledged the support of its official sponsors, REMAX Coastal and SCH, noting that their contributions play a key role in the continued success of the event.The marathon is expected to bring together runners of varying abilities, reinforcing Knysna’s reputation as a popular destination for outdoor sporting events.","html":"The 5km fun run, in particular, is expected to draw community members looking for a relaxed and social race experience.

With Valentine’s Day falling on race day, organisers say the marathon offers participants an opportunity to combine fitness with a shared social experience. Runners are encouraged to take part with partners, friends or family members, while visitors can enjoy the festive atmosphere surrounding the event.

Entries are available online via entryninja.com where participants can search for Knysna Heads to register.

The Knysna Marathon Club acknowledged the support of its official sponsors, REMAX Coastal and SCH, noting that their contributions play a key role in the continued success of the event.

The marathon is expected to bring together runners of varying abilities, reinforcing Knysna’s reputation as a popular destination for outdoor sporting events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Knysna Heads Marathon set for Valentine’s Day run
